checks.name: critical_artifacts_present
checks.reason: All configured recovery artifacts exist and the manifest has no duplicate paths.

checks.name: restore_hash_match
checks.reason: Every restored artifact matches the source SHA-256 checksum.

checks.name: group_coverage
checks.reason: Recovery manifest covers release evidence, security evidence, observability contracts, manifests, and source policy.

checks.name: generated_artifact_restore
checks.reason: Generated Kubernetes, Grafana, OpenSLO, and admission policy artifacts are restored with matching hashes.

checks.name: rto_budget
checks.reason: Estimated restore time fits inside the RTO.

checks.name: rpo_budget
checks.reason: Required latest-release evidence is in the backup set and estimated data loss fits inside the RPO.

checks.name: negative_fixture_coverage
checks.reason: Negative recovery fixtures are mapped to checks that would fail.
